name: Chinese (Mandarin, Simplified)
modelReview: blind 3-persona Sonnet style panel + author/audit corpus workflow (2026-06-20); npm run fuzz zh clean (0 throws / degenerate / missing-value)
note: BETA — model-validated by a blind 3-persona Sonnet panel (src/lang/zh/notes.md), corpus authored via an author/audit/fix workflow and converged to the renderer's canonical forms. Graduates to stable only on fluent-human review.

zh-Hant.name: Chinese (Mandarin, Traditional)
zh-Hant.note: EXPERIMENTAL — a within-zh variant (the reviewed Simplified output with a 1:1 Han glyph map applied at the render boundary, selected by {dialect: 'zh-Hant'}), NOT a separate locale. Model-drafted glyph/register mapping, not yet validated by a Traditional-native or blind Hant panel. Graduates to beta on a Traditional-native / blind Hant review (the same gate model as Simplified zh). Whole-word choices flagged for native review: 運行時間 (vs 執行時間), 表達式 (vs 運算式 / 表示式).
